about.name: Deshant Singh Bani
about.headline: I build agentic AI systems & LLM-powered products
about.oneLiner: From LangGraph multi-agents to RAG and document intelligence.
about.bio: AI/ML Engineer with hands-on experience building production-ready systems across multi-agent workflows, RAG, and document intelligence. I've delivered AI POCs for enterprise clients including Microsoft and Hyundai North America, and led technical walkthroughs with senior engineering stakeholders. I specialize in LangGraph, FastAPI, and end-to-end deployment from design to delivery.

education.institution: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Nagpur

about.quote: Building production-ready AI that cuts manual work from days to minutes.

bullets: Presented AI POCs to enterprise clients including Microsoft, Hyundai North America, and a Europe-based tech firm; led technical walkthroughs and Q&A with senior engineering and business stakeholders.
Currently on an active Fortune 500 client engagement with direct ownership of AI system design and delivery.
Built a LangGraph multi-agent recruitment system with GPT-5.2 scoring, ChromaDB retrieval, and ElevenLabs AI interviews — cutting candidate screening from days to hours.

Developed a SOC2 compliance audit platform using LangGraph, Microsoft Graph (MSAL), and image-aware DOCX/PDF validation — cutting manual audit review from hours to minutes with automated pass/fail reporting.
Engineered an agentic root cause analysis system using LLM reasoning over historical ticket data, enabling domain leads to trace and resolve upstream failures without manual investigation.

Migrated a Java middleware layer to Python FastAPI, rebuilding the communication layer between an Angular frontend and data science backends — improving maintainability and cutting deployment time for AI features.
Built a vehicle diagnostic simplification API using GPT-4o to translate fault reports into consumer-friendly summaries — enabling a $5 subscription model at $0.015/report cost.
Engineered a GPT-4o translation pipeline for automotive fault codes across multiple languages, enabling global expansion with 50% cost savings across 10M+ records.
Automated PDF-to-structured-data extraction with GPT-4o and FastAPI, reducing the catalogue update team from 3 to 1 and cutting per-document processing from 12 hours to 2 hours.
Engineered a production multi-agent framework achieving a 100% task completion rate across complex automated workflows.
Adapted Magnetic-One for LLaMA 3.2 Vision 90B, cutting infrastructure costs by 35% without quality loss.
Built a web extraction and RAG pipeline using Playwright, delivering 50% faster query responses.
Built a customer-facing AI chatbot for the company website using AWS Bedrock, allowing clients to instantly query product and technical information.
Designed a serverless RAG pipeline (Docker + Lambda) with session-aware query tracking, reducing embedding time by 97% and query latency by 95%.

projects.title: Phishing URL Detection System
projects.description: High-throughput phishing detection model processing 100k+ URLs/batch at 1k predictions/min. Deployed via automated CI/CD with Docker, AWS, Airflow, and Terraform.

certifications.name: NVIDIA: Fundamentals of Accelerated Computing with CUDA Python

por.role: AIML Core Team Member, Google Developers Group OnCampus IIITN
